name: StudioCobFC-30

importPlugin.comment: GDTF v1.2 fixture type ID: C131D00D-C813-4A5B-81B5-AC7ECEE57659

comment: StudioCob FC is a powerful, incredibly versatile and full colour LED PAR. Fusing the old and the new, it pairs a full colour COB LED source with a traditional parabolic reflector to deliver a proper Par replacement with a homogenised output, single shadow and flexible lens options.

gwSpecs.description: StudioCob FC is a powerful, incredibly versatile and full colour LED PAR. Fusing the old and the new, it pairs a full colour COB LED source with a traditional parabolic reflector to deliver a proper Par replacement with a homogenised output, single shadow and flexible lens options.
